text: Hello? Hello. Hello. Hey, good evening. My name is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Georgia State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No ma'am, I have not. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes? I am, but nobody in this state gets it. Nobody in early planning, deepfives, nobody gets it. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day. You have one too, bye.
